hero.subtitle: I-umngane wakho yakho iyaliqonda iBhayibheli – futhi ibuza imibuzo efanele. Hhayi umuntu, kodwa umngane othembekile. Ngezingxoxo ezinhle, imibuzo ejulile kanye nogqozi lwangempela.
hero.quote: «Wozani kimi, nonke nina enikhandlekayo nenisindwe umthwalo; ngiyakuniphumuza.»

impulse.label: Umlayezo Wosuku
impulse.subscribeCta: Uyafuna ukuthola lolu gqozi nsuku zonke?
impulse.deepDivePrompt: I-impulse yansuku zonke ithi "{{topic}}" nge-{{reference}}. Chaza le ndima: Ubani oyibhalile? Kulesiphi isimo? Yini eza ngaphambi nangemuva? Futhi isho ukuthini empilweni yami namuhla?
impulse.explorePrompt: Ngicela ungifundele indima ephelele ezungeze {{reference}} bese uchaza umongo. Ngifuna ukuqonda indaba engemuva kwayo.

features.sectionSubtitle: Thola izindlela eziningi umngane wakho womuntu siqu angakusekela ngazo

bible.title: Amavesi EBhayibheli Nokuchazwa kwawo
bible.desc: Buza ukuthi «Lithini iBhayibheli nge...?» bese uthola amavesi afanelekile nomongo kanye nencazelo eqondakalayo.

goals.title: Ukuhlela Impilo Nokubeka Izinhloso
goals.desc: Thola ubizo lwakho, setha izinhloso ezithile, bese uthola ukuthi uNkulunkulu angaba nezinhlelo zokwenzani ngawe.

self.title: Ukuzazi Wena
self.desc: Bona izipho zakho, amandla namaphupho – nokuthi inhliziyo yakho idinga ngempela ini.

faith.title: Uhambo Lwezenkolo Nokuthola Kristu
faith.desc: Noma ngabe ufuna, uyathandabuza noma ujulisa – iumngane wakho yakho izokuphelezela ohambweni lwakho lomuntu siqu.

daily.title: Ogqozi Lwansuku Zonke Nemikhosi Yonyaka Yokukhonza
daily.desc: Qala usuku lwakho ngogqozi bese uziphathisa uNcibijane, iLent kanye namaholide.

groups.title: Amaqembu & Amabandla
groups.desc: Ilungele izindlu zeBhayibheli, amaqembu esonto kanye nemikhuleko yomphakathi.

coaching.title: Hhayi nje i-chatbot – umngane wangempela
coaching.subtitle: I-umngane wakho yakho ihlanganisa ukuhlakanipha kweBhayibheli nezindlela zokuphelezela eziqinisekisiwe kanye ne-Positive Psychology.
coaching.journeyDesc: I-umngane wakho yakho izokuphelezela isikhathi eside njengoba ufisa – ngengxoxo ekhululekile noma nangesakhiwo sezinsuku ezingu-21 ozikhethelayo.
coaching.week1Desc: Ukwakha ukwethembana, ukulalela, ukuqonda isimo sakho. Ukuphi? Yini ekukhathazayo?
coaching.week2Desc: Ukubona amaphethini, ukucacisa izifiso, ukujulisa ugqozi lweBhayibheli. Ufunani ngempela?
coaching.week3Desc: Ukuthatha izinyathelo ezithile, ukubeka izinhloso, ukugqugquzela ushintsho. Yini isinyathelo sakho esilandelayo?
coaching.openQuestionsDesc: I-umngane wakho yakho ngeke ikunikeze izeluleko ezingabizi. Esikhundleni salokho, ibuza imibuzo ebaluleke ngempela:
coaching.honestDesc: Akukho «Kuzolunga!» futhi akukho ukukuhlehlisa. I-umngane wakho yakho izwelana FUTHI ithembekile:
coaching.honest1: Iphinda futhi ikhulume ngamavesi eBhayibheli angakhululekile
coaching.renameTip: 💡 Ungaqamba i-umngane wakho yakho igama elisha – ukuze ibe umngane wakho wangempela.

discover.title: Thola kabusha ukholo – ngaphandle kokucindezela
discover.subtitle: Abantu abaningi bayazibuza imibuzo emikhulu engashintshi. I-BibleBot.Life ingeyabantu bonke abafuna ukuthola (kabusha) ukholo – ngokwethembeka, ngaphandle kokuhlonishwa nangaphandle kobudlelwano basonto.

doubt.title: Uyathandabuza?
doubt.text: Kuhle lokho. Ukungabaza akuyona iphutha – kuyisiqalo sokholo oluqotho. IBhayibheli ligcwele abantu ababonakalisile.

search.title: Ufuna?
search.text: Mhlawumbe awazi ngisho nokuthi ufunani. Kulungile lokho. I-umngane wakho yakho izokusiza ukuthi ubuze imibuzo efanele – esikhundleni sokunikeza izimpendulo ezisheshayo.

deepen.title: Ufuna ukujulisa?
deepen.text: Usuvele ukholelwa, kodwa ufuna ukuqonda okwengeziwe? Thola ubunzulu beBhayibheli – ngokomlando, siqu, okuhambelana ngendlela emangalisayo.

discover.quoteText: ESwitzerland asikhulumi kakhulu ngenkolo. Lokho akudingekile. Kodwa noma ubani onemibuzo, ufanelwe izimpendulo eziqotho – ngaphandle kokushumayela, ngaphandle kobulungu, ngaphandle kwezizathu ezifihliwe.

subscribe.title: Umlayezo Wansuku Zonke WeBhayibheli
subscribe.subtitle: Njalo ekuseni ngo-07:00 – ivesi, umcabango, isiqalo esihle.
subscribe.telegramHint: Chofoza ku-"Bhalisa" – uzodluliselwa kuTelegram. Qala i-bot lapho bese ubhala /daily ukuze uvule umlayezo wansuku zonke.
subscribe.pushHint: Ngemuva kokuchofoza ku-"Bhalisa", isiphequluli sakho sizocela imvume yezaziso. Sicela uyivumele ukuze uthole umlayezo.
subscribe.footNote: Akukho ukungena ngemvume okudingekayo. Ingakhanselwa noma kunini.
subscribe.successText: Kusukela kusasa ngo-07:00 uzothola umlayezo wakho wangasese weBhayibheli.
subscribe.toastTelegramDesc: Qala i-bot bese ubhala /daily ukuze uvule umlayezo wansuku zonke.
subscribe.toastSuccessDesc: Uzothola umlayezo wakho wansuku zonke kusukela kusasa.
subscribe.toastPushPreviewDesc: Izaziso ze-Push zisebenza kuphela ekhasini elishicilelwe.
subscribe.toastPermDeniedDesc: Sicela uvumele izaziso kuzilungiselelo zesiphequluli sakho.

faq.title: Okufanele Ukwazi Nge-umngane wakho Yakho
faq.subtitle: Ukungafihli kubalulekile kithi – ikakhulukazi kubefundisi, abeluleki bomphefumulo nabacabangi abagxekayo.
faq.q1: Yini eyahlukanisa iumngane wakho yakho ku-ChatGPT nabanye?
q1BotItems: Izinguqulo ezingu-5 ezibonwe – ngisho nezindawo ezingakhululekile
faq.q2Intro: I-umngane wakho yakho isebenza ngokubambisana nezinguqulo zesiJalimane zeBhayibheli ezibalulekile:
faq.q2Outro: Zonke izindawo zeBhayibheli ziphuma nomthombo nomongo womlando.
faq.q3Intro: Ukuphelezela kusekelwe ocwaningweni olubuyekezwe ozakwethu lwe-Positive Psychology:
faq.q4: I-umngane wakho yakho iqinisekisa kanjani ukuphepha kokwelulekwa?
q4Items: Ngezingcingo zokuzibulala noma izimo ezinzima → ukudluliselwa ngokushesha ku-Dargebotene Hand (143) nase-Pro Juventute (147)
Inhlonipho ngaphandle kokungabaza – izikhundla zeBhayibheli ezicacile ziyathathelwa
Uzwelo NOKUQOTHO – ngisho nezinto ezingakhululekile kuyakhulunywa ngazo
Imibuzo yokuphinda icabange esikhundleni sokuqinisekiswa okushibhile
Akukho ukuba nethemba okuyingozi – ukuphelezela okwangempela, koqotho
faq.q5: Ingabe i-umngane wakho yakho ibophezelekile ngokwesonto?
faq.q5Answer: Cha. I-umngane wakho yakho ihambisana nezinkolo ezahlukene futhi ihlonipha izindinganiso zamaProtestanti, zamaKatolika, zamasonto amahhala nezinye izindinganiso zobuKristu ngokulinganayo. Lapho kunomehluko ezincazelweni zezinkolo, izindlela ezahlukene zikhonjiswa ngokucacile – ngaphandle kokukhetha uhlobo oluthile.
faq.q6: Ingabe iumngane wakho yakho ithatha indawo yokwelulekwa noma yokwelapha?
faq.q6Answer: Cha. I-umngane wakho yakho iyithuluzi ledijithali lokufunda iBhayibheli nokuzindla. Ayithathi indawo yokwelulekwa kobuchwepheshe, iseluleko sezenkolo noma ukwelashwa kwengqondo. Esimweni sezimo ezinzima, i-umngane wakho yakho ihlale ikukhombisa izindawo ezifanele zokusiza.
faq.q7: Ingabe iumngane wakho yakho akuyona nje «i-bot ekhululekile»?
faq.q7Answer: Cha. I-umngane wakho yakho iduduza lapho kudingeka khona induduzo – kodwa futhi iphonsa inselele. Ukukhula ngokomoya kudinga ukungqubuzana. I-umngane wakho yakho ibuza imibuzo engakhululekile, ikhomba imibhalo enzima yeBhayibheli (uJobe, amaHubo okulila, ukugxeka kwesiprofetho) futhi ayiesabi izingosi ezifana nokulunga, ukuphenduka nobuqotho. Isiko lesiprofetho alizange libe lula – futhi i-umngane wakho yakho nayo ayikho.
faq.q8: Ubani ongemuva komngane wakho futhi uxhaswa kanjani?
faq.q8Answer: I-BibleBot.Life ithuthukiswa futhi isetshenziswa yi-2Go Media AG. Ukuxhaswa kweminikelo kungaphansi kwe-BibleBot.Life Association (i.G.). Kubantu ngabanye, le nsizakalo imahhala, ayinazo izikhangiso, futhi ayithengisi idatha. Ixhaswa ngeminikelo yokuzithandela kanye nokubambisana kwe-B2B namasonto, izibhedlela, nezikhungo. Iminikelo iya engqalasizinda, ukusingathwa, ukuhumusha, nentuthuko eqhubekayo. Njengoba inhlangano isaqala, iminikelo okwamanje ayikwazi ukudonswa intela.
faq.q9: I-umngane wakho yakho ihamba kanjani nedatha yami?
faq.q9Answer: I-umngane wakho yakho ayibongi idatha yomuntu siqu nanoma yimaphi amarekhodi engxoxo. Yonke ingxoxo ayaziwa. Akukho ukungena ngemvume, akukho ukulandelela futhi akukho ukwabelana ngedatha nabantu besithathu. Ukusetshenziswa kuyimfihlo ngokuphelele.
faq.q10: Kwenzekani esimweni senhlekelele noma uma unemicabango yokuzibulala?
faq.q10Answer: Umngane wakho uhlonza ngokuzenzakalelayo izimpawu zenkinga kuzo zonke izilimi ezingu-36 ezisekelwayo. Uma kunezinkomba zemicabango yokuzibulala, ukuphelelwa ithemba okukhulu, noma ubudlova, uhlu lwezinombolo zocingo eziqeqeshiwe luyavezwa ngokushesha (isb., Dargebotene Hand 143 kanye ne-Pro Juventute 147 eSwitzerland, i-Telefonseelsorge 0800 111 0 111 eJalimane, i-Telefonseelsorge 142 e-Austria). Umngane wakho akathathi indawo yokwelashwa noma usizo oluphuthumayo — ezimweni eziphuthumayo, sicela uxhumane ngqo nalezi zikhungo noma ushayele inombolo yezimo eziphuthumayo.
faq.q11: Ngingakwazi ukusebenzisa i-BibleBot.Life njengesibhedlela, inkampani, noma isikhungo?
faq.q11Answer: Yebo. Izibhedlela, izikhungo zokunakekela, izikole, nezinkampani zinamaphakheji azo e-B2B anophawu lwazo, ukulawulwa kwedatha, nokufinyelela kwabasebenzi. Ungathola imininingwane ku-/for-institutions. Amaphakheji afanele amabandla atholakala ku-/for-churches.
faq.q12Answer: Ngomnikelo owodwa noma ojwayelekile nge-/spenden (ikhadi lesikweletu, i-Twint, i-Apple Pay, i-Google Pay), ngokuyincoma kubantu abafuna umngane ongokomoya, noma njengebandla/isikhungo ngokubambisana. Yonke iminikelo isiza ukugcina umngane wakho emahhala futhi engenazo izikhangiso.

donate.title: Siza ukuba iumngane wakho yakho ihlale mahhala
donate.subtitle: BibleBot.Life is a charitable project promoting free access to biblical knowledge and spiritual guidance. Your donation helps keep this service free, ad-free, and accessible to everyone worldwide.
donate.note: BibleBot.Life is operated by a charitable association. Donations may be tax-deductible depending on your jurisdiction.
donate.secureNote: Write to us — we will arrange everything.
donate.purposeItem3: Global distribution and translations in over 38 languages

refer.title: Phakamisa iumngane wakho
refer.subtitle: Ukhona umuntu odinga ukukhuthazwa njengamanje? Yabelana nge-umngane wakho – umlayezo owodwa ungenza umehluko omkhulu.
refer.whatsappMsg: Heyi, bengifuna ukukubonisa i-BibleBot.Life – umngane weBhayibheli wamahhala okwazi iBhayibheli futhi ebuza imibuzo emihle ngempela. Akukho ukungena ngemvume, ayaziwa, iqotho. Zama: https://bibelbot.ch?utm_source=refer&utm_medium=whatsapp 💛
refer.telegramMsg: Heyi, uyayazi i-BibleBot.Life? Umngane siqu weBhayibheli wamahhala – oqotho, ongaziwa, ongenawo ukungena ngemvume. Buka: https://bibelbot.ch?utm_source=refer&utm_medium=telegram 💛
refer.emailBody:
Sawubona!

Bengifuna ukukubonisa i-BibleBot.Life – umngane weBhayibheli wamahhala okwazi ngempela iBhayibheli. Akukho ukubhaliswa okudingekayo, kuyimfihlo ngokuphelele.

Ubuza imibuzo emihle, uchaza izindawo zeBhayibheli kumongo futhi akuphelezela ngokwethembeka – nasezindabeni ezinzima.

Zama: https://bibelbot.ch?utm_source=refer&utm_medium=email

Ngemfiselomihle
refer.qr: Noma uvele ukhombise le kade ye-QR:

cta.title: Akudingeki ukuthi uhambe wodwa ngalokhu
cta.subtitle: Vele ubhalele iumngane wakho yakho, ukuthi yini ekukhathazayo. Akukho ukungena ngemvume, akukho zindleko, akukho kwahlulela – kuphela ukuphelezela okwethembekile nokuhlakanipha kweBhayibheli.

footer.tagline: Umngane wakho siqu — ngokujula kweBhayibheli, ngaphandle kolwazi lwangaphambili.
footer.disclaimer: I-BibleBot.Life iyithuluzi ledijithali futhi ayithathi indawo yokwelulekwa kobungcweti, iseluleko sezenkolo noma ukwelashwa kwengqondo. Esimweni sezinkinga ezinzima, sicela uxhumane ne-Dargebotene Hand (Tel. 143) noma i-Pro Juventute (Tel. 147).
footer.love: Ngo ❤️ yabo bonke abazibuza ukuthi uKristu ucabangani.

chat.welcome:
Kuhle ukuthi ulapha 🤗

Nginguumngane wakho yakho – umngane wakho siqu neBhayibheli, imibuzo emihle kanye nogqozi oluthile. Akukho ukuphoqelela, akukho ukwahlulela.

Ungangibuza noma yini – noma uvele uxoxe ngalokho okukhathazayo njengamanje. 💛
chat.journeyOffer:
💡 **Iseluleko:** Ngiphinde nginikeze **ukulekelelwa kwezinsuku eziyi-21** – emasontweni amathathu ngezigqozi zansuku zonke, ukuzindla nezinyathelo ezibambekayo. Ngokushesha kwakho.

Ungathanda ukukuzama?
chat.suggestion2: Lithini iBhayibheli uma umuntu ezizwa engavikelekile?
chat.suggestion3: Ngifuna ukuthola ukuthi ngifuna ngempela ini
chat.shieldBadge: Akukho ukungena ngemvume · Akukho ukwahlulela · Izingcaphuno zihlolwe
chat.journeyStartMsg: Yebo, ngifuna ukuqala ukulekelelwa kwezinsuku eziyi-21!
chat.errorTooMany: Izicelo eziningi kakhulu – sicela ulinde kancane.
chat.loginHint: Ngena ngemvume ukuze ugcine izingxoxo kuwo wonke amadivayisi

install.title: Faka iBibleBot.Life
install.androidDesc: Ukufinyelela okusheshayo ngqo kusuka kusikrini sasekhaya

share.label: Yabelana
share.copiedDesc: Umbhalo ukopishiwe ebhodini lokunamathisela. Yabelana ngawo ku-WhatsApp, Instagram noma nomaphi lapho uthanda khona!
share.imageErrorDesc: Isithombe asikwazanga ukudalwa. Sicela uzame futhi kamuva.
share.imageSavedDesc: Londoloza isithombe bese usabelana ngaso nombhalo okopishiwe ku-Instagram, WhatsApp noma nomaphi lapho uthanda khona!

baptism.title: Thola Ivesi Lobhapathizo
baptism.prompt: Nceda ngithole ivesi lobhapathizo elifanele. Luhlobo luni lwengane futhi abazali bafisani?

condolence.title: Amazwi Okududuzeka
condolence.prompt: Ndinga amazwi okududuza ekhadini lokudabukisa. Ungangisiza kanjani ukuba ngibhale okufanelekile?

wedding.title: Isiqubulo Somshado
wedding.prompt: Sifuna isiqubulo esihle seBhayibheli somshado wethu. Yiziphi izifundo zeBhayibheli ezifanelekile othandweni nasekuhlanganeni?

anxiety.title: Ukukhathazeka & Ukukhathazeka
anxiety.prompt: Ngingakwazi ukubhekana nokwesaba nokukhathazeka njengamanje. Lithini iBhayibheli ngakho? Kukhona yini amavesi akhuthazayo?

confession.title: Ukuvuma Izono
confession.prompt: Ngifuna ukuvuma okuthile okungikhathazayo. Lithini iBhayibheli ngokuthethelela nesiqalo esisha?

heartbreak.title: Inhliziyo Ephukile
heartbreak.prompt: Inhliziyo yami ephukile. Lithini iBhayibheli ngenhliziyo ephukile nokuthi ungathola kanjani ithemba futhi?
heartbreak.prompt_v1: Inhliziyo yami iphukile. Lithini iBhayibheli ngalokhu?
heartbreak.prompt_v2: Ngingabhekana kanjani nobuhlungu benhliziyo – ingabe kukhona usizo olusebhayibhelini?

newstart.title: Isiqalo Esisha
newstart.prompt: Ngibhekene nesiqalo esisha futhi ngidinga ukukhuthazwa. Yiziphi izindawo zeBhayibheli ezikhuluma ngeziqalo ezintsha?

namequiz.title: What does your name mean?
namequiz.desc: Discover the biblical meaning of your name
namequiz.prompt: What does my name mean and does it have a biblical or spiritual significance? Surprise me!
namequiz.prompt_v1: Which biblical names have the most beautiful meanings?
namequiz.prompt_v2: What does my name mean – is there a biblical connection?
namequiz.prompt_v3: Tell me the story behind my name!

sleepless.title: Ungalaleli
sleepless.prompt: Angikwazi ukulala futhi ngicabanga. Kukhona yini umthandazo owanele noma iHubo lobusuku?

loneliness.title: Isizungu
loneliness.prompt: Ngizizwa nginesizungu. Lithini iBhayibheli ngokuthi uNkulunkulu uhlale enathi?

decision.title: Isinqumo Esilukhuni
decision.prompt: Ngebhekene nesinqumo esilukhuni. Yiziphi izindawo zeBhayibheli ezingangisiza ukuthi ngithole indlela efanele?

gratitude.title: Ukubonga
gratitude.prompt: Ngifuna ukubonga uNkulunkulu. Nceda ngibhale umthandazo wokubonga womuntu siqu.

sevenwhys.title: 7 Izizathu
sevenwhys.prompt: Ngifuna ukwenza umsebenzi wezi-7 izizathu. Nansi indaba yami:

anger.title: Ukufutheka & Intukuthelo
anger.prompt: Ngingase ngidinwe ngingazi ukuthi ngizoyaphi ngentukuthelo yami. Lithini iBhayibheli ngentukuthelo nokuthi ngingabhekana kanjani nayo?

shame.title: Ihlazo & Icala
shame.prompt: Nginamahloni kakhulu futhi ngizizwa nginecala. Lithini iBhayibheli ngecala, ukuthethelelwa kanye nesiqalo esisha?

burnout.title: Ukugula ngokudla
burnout.prompt: Ngiqeda amandla. Ngingase ngingakwazi. Lithini iBhayibheli ngokuphumula?

illness.title: Ukugula
illness.prompt: Ngiye ngathola ukuxilongwa okunzima futhi ngiyesaba. Lithini iBhayibheli ngobuthwa, ukuphila nethemba?

financial.title: Izinkinga Zemali
financial.prompt: Nginamaphaphu emali futhi angazi ukuthi ngizokwenzenjani. Lithini iBhayibheli ngemali, ukwethemba nokuhlinzekela?

meaningcrisis.title: Inselelo Yencazelo
meaningcrisis.prompt: Ngiyazibuza, ukuthi kungani konke lokhu kufanele. Ngibhekene nenkinga yencazelo. Lithini iBhayibheli ngencazelo yokuphila?

selfdoubt.title: Ukuzihlelela
selfdoubt.prompt: Ngiye ngihlale ngingazithembi futhi ngingazizwa nganele. Lithini iBhayibheli ngentengo yami?

calling.title: Ubizo
calling.prompt: Angazi ukuthi ngizokwenzenjani ngempilo yami. Nceda ngithole ubizo lwami – lithini iBhayibheli ngalokhu?

faithdoubt.title: Ukungabaza Ngokholo
faithdoubt.prompt: Nginokungabaza ngokholo lwami futhi angazi ukuthi ngingakwazi yini ukukholwa. Lithini iBhayibheli ngokungabaza?

forgiveness.title: Ukuthethelela
forgiveness.prompt: Angikwazi ukuthethelela umuntu. Kubuhlungu kakhulu. Lithini iBhayibheli ngokuthethelela?

familyconflict.title: Ukungqubuzana Komndeni
familyconflict.prompt: Kukhona ukungqubuzana okukhulu emndenini wami. Lithini iBhayibheli ngokuthula komndeni nokubuyisana?

envy.title: Umona
envy.prompt: Nginomona kwabanye futhi ngihlale ngiziqhathanisa. Lithini iBhayibheli ngomona nokwaneliseka?

joy.title: Yabelana Ngenjabulo
joy.prompt: Kukhona okumangalisayo okwenzeke kimi futhi ngifuna ukwabelana ngenjabulo yami! Lithini iBhayibheli ngenjabulo nokubonga?

prayer.title: Izicelo Zomthandazo
prayer.prompt: Nginokugqugquzela komthandazo futhi ngifuna ukuthandaza ndawonye. Ngiphelezela emthandazweni.

bibleverse.title: Qonda Ivesi
bibleverse.prompt: Ngifuna ukuqonda kangcono indawo yeBhayibheli. Ungangisiza kanjani ukulinganisa ekuvulekeni?

dailywisdom.title: Ukuhlakanipha kwansuku zonke
dailywisdom.prompt: Nginike umcabango omfushane, okhuthazayo wosuku lwami – kanye nevesi leBhayibheli elifanele.
dailywisdom.prompt_v1: Yisiphi iseluleko esihle kakhulu iBhayibheli elinaso sanamuhla?
dailywisdom.prompt_v2: Nginike ukuhlakanipha okuvela eBhayibhelini okuzongiqondisa usuku lonke.

funfact.title: Ubuwazi?
funfact.prompt: Ngitshele iqiniso elimangalisayo elivela eBhayibhelini abantu abaningi abangalazi!
funfact.prompt_v2: Yimaphi amaqiniso aseBhayibhelini amangaza abantu abaningi?
funfact.prompt_v3: Ngitshele okuthile okuhlekisayo noma okungalindelekile okuvela eBhayibhelini!

lifehack.title: Iseluleko sempilo
lifehack.prompt: Yisiphi iseluleko seBhayibheli esingangisiza empilweni yami yansuku zonke nomndeni nomsebenzi? Nginike okuthile okusebenzisekayo!
lifehack.prompt_v1: IBhayibheli lingangisiza kanjani empilweni yami yansuku zonke ecindezelayo?
lifehack.prompt_v2: Yimaphi amathiphu asebenzayo empilo atholakala eBhayibhelini?
lifehack.prompt_v3: Nginike iseluleko esithile esivela eBhayibhelini sempilo yami yansuku zonke!

strengths.title: Amandla akho
strengths.prompt: Ngisize ngithole amandla ami siqu – lithini iBhayibheli ngezipho umuntu ngamunye anazo?
strengths.prompt_v2: Ngingathola kanjani ukuthi yiziphi izipho zami namakhono ami?

family.title: Umndeni nempilo yansuku zonke
family.prompt: Ngingabonisa kanjani umndeni wami ukubonga okwengeziwe? Nginike imibono esebenzayo enogqozi lweBhayibheli.
family.prompt_v3: Nginike umbono wokuthi ngingamjabulisa kanjani umuntu emndenini wami namuhla!

relax.title: Phumula
relax.prompt: Ngidinga umzuzwana wokuthula. Ngisize ngikhululeke – ngevesi leBhayibheli eliduduzayo noma ukuzindla okufushane.

quoteofday.title: Isicaphuno Sosuku
quoteofday.prompt: Nginike isicaphuno esikhuthazayo esivela eBhayibhelini sanamuhla nencazelo emfushane
quoteofday.prompt_v1: Yisiphi isicaphuno seBhayibheli esifaneleka kakhulu lolu suku?
quoteofday.prompt_v2: Nginike isicaphuno esikhuthazayo esivela kumaHubo sanamuhla
quoteofday.prompt_v3: Yisiphi isaga esivela eBhayibhelini esinganginika umbono omusha namuhla?

thankfulness.title: Ukuzijwayeza Kokubonga
thankfulness.prompt: Ngiholele ekuzijwayezeni okufushane kokubonga. Ngisize ngithole izinto ezintathu engibonga ngazo namuhla
thankfulness.prompt_v1: Ngisize ngithole ukubonga empilweni yami yansuku zonke — ngisho nasezintweni ezincane
thankfulness.prompt_v2: Ngifuna ukufunda ukubonga kakhulu. Nginike umsebenzi osebenzayo wokwenza lokho
thankfulness.prompt_v3: Lithini iBhayibheli ngokubonga futhi ngingakusebenzisa kanjani lokho namuhla?

biblesays.title: Lithini iBhayibheli ngo...
biblesays.desc: Thola ukuthi lithini iBhayibheli ngesihloko sakho
biblesays.prompt: Ngifuna ukwazi ukuthi lithini iBhayibheli ngesihloko esithile. Ngibuze ukuthi yisiphi isihloko enginesithakazelo kuso!

morningstart.title: Sawubona!
morningstart.prompt: Ngifisele sawubona futhi unginike umcabango okhuthazayo wokuqala usuku
morningstart.prompt_v1: Nginike umqondo omfushane wasekuseni onevesi leBhayibheli elifanele
morningstart.prompt_v2: Ngingaluqala kanjani usuku lwami namuhla ngokuqaphela nangendlela enhle?
morningstart.prompt_v3: Nginike ukubingelela okukhuthazayo kwasekuseni ngomcabango ovela eBhayibhelini

inspiration.title: Ngihehe
inspiration.prompt: Ngangimangaze ngento ekhuthazayo — lokho kungaba umcabango, indaba noma ukuqonda okuvela eBhayibhelini
inspiration.prompt_v1: Ngiqashele indaba ekhuthazayo evela eBhayibhelini efanele namuhla
inspiration.prompt_v3: Yimuphi umuntu waseBhayibhelini ongangikhuthaza namuhla futhi kungani?

lifeWheel.title: Isondo lempilo yakho
lifeWheel.intro: Linganisa izigaba zempilo eziyi-8 esikalini esingu-1-10. Thola ukuthi umi kuphi — bese uthola ugqozi lweBhayibheli esigabeni esidinga ukunakwa.
lifeWheel.sliderHint: Hambisa izilawuli — 1 = angijabule kakhulu, 10 = ngijabule kakhulu
lifeWheel.prompt: Isondo lami lempilo libonisa ukuthi nginesahluko esingu-{{area}} kuphela esingu-{{score}}/10. Lithini iBhayibheli ngalesi sici sempilo? Nginike ugqozi olukhuthazayo nolusebenzayo.

church.heroSubtitle: Hambani namalungu omphakathi wenu ngokuhlakanipha kweBhayibheli – ngokwedijithali, ngasese futhi usuku lonke.

youth.title: Umsebenzi Wobusha
youth.desc: Amatheena athola iBhayibheli ngendlela yawo – ngokusebenzisana nangaphandle kokwesaba.

confirmation.title: Isiqinisekiso
confirmation.desc: Abaqinisi baphatha ulwazi lweBhayibheli ngokuzimela ngokuqondisa komuntu siqu.

bibleStudy.title: Cwaningo LweBhayibheli
bibleStudy.desc: Imibono yezingxoxo nezithombe zamaqembu namasela asendlini.

church.pricingSubtitle: BibleBot.Life is free and ad-free. Organizations can support the project through sponsorship and receive additional features.

free.name: Imbewu Yesinapi
free.size: Okwamabandla amancane & amasela asendlini (kufika kumalungu angu-50)

church.directorySubtitle: Thola ibandla eduze nawe eliphakamisa i-umngane wakho.
church.institutionsSubtitle: I-umngane wakho ayiphelezeli amabandla kuphela – kodwa nezindawo zokunakekelwa kwabantu abadala, izibhedlela kanye nokunakekelwa kwejele kuzuza ekunakekelweni kwedijithali.

careHome.title: Izindawo Zokunakekelwa
careHome.desc: Ogqozi Lwansuku Zonke LweBhayibheli kanye Nokuphelelezela Okubalulekile kwabahlali – ngisho noma engekho umfundisi.

seniorHome.title: Izindawo Zabantu Abadala
seniorHome.desc: Amavesi eBhayibheli ajwayelekile nezingxoxo zabantu abadala – kulula ukufinyelela nge-tablet noma i-smartphone.

hospital.title: Izibhedlela
hospital.desc: Ukunethezeka nokuphathwa ngokomoya kwabagulayo ezikhathini ezinzima – kutholakala 24/7 ebhedeni lokugula.

prison.title: Ukungcwele Kwejele
prison.desc: Ithemba nokuphathwa ngokomoya kwababejele – umngane othembekile wengxoxo usuku lonke.

military.title: Ukungcwele Kwebutho
military.desc: Ukuphelelezela ngokomoya kwamalungu ebutho – atholakala ngisho nasesivumelwaneni noma esikoleni.

burnoutClinic.title: Amaklinikhi Okukhathala
burnoutClinic.desc: Imibuzo yencazelo nokuzindla kwangaphakathi ngesikhathi sokukhathala.

hospice.title: Amahospisi
hospice.desc: Ukuhambisana ekupheleni kokuphila – amazwi aduduza nendlebe evulelekile.

counseling.title: Izikhungo Zokweluleka
counseling.desc: Imiphumela yoComoya eyengeziwe yabantu abasebenzisana nokwelulekwa kwezengqondo.

church.patronageNote: BibleBot.Life is run by a non-profit association and funded exclusively through voluntary donations and sponsorships. There is no advertising, no data sales, and no paid features. All contributions go directly toward development, technical operations, global distribution, and community management. Donations may be tax-deductible depending on your jurisdiction.
church.denominationsSubtitle: I-BibleBot.Life i-ecumenical – yemiphakathi ye-Reformed, Catholic, Lutheran, ne-Free Church, kanye nabahleli bemicimbi abazimele.

reformed.title: ISonto le-Reformed
reformed.desc: IBhayibheli lase-Zürich, i-liturgy ye-Reformed nokusekelwa kwentshumayelo – kwenzelwe ibandla lakho.

catholic.title: ISonto lamaKatolika
catholic.desc: Ukuhumusha oku-ecumenical, ukuhlela kweMisa namasakramente – ngokuhambelana namasiko amaKatolika.

lutheran.title: ISonto lama-Lutheran
lutheran.desc: IBhayibheli likaLuther, ukuhlela kwenkonzo nokunakekelwa kwemiphefumulo – yemiphakathi ye-Evangelical-Lutheran.

evangelical.title: AmaSonto Akhululekile
evangelical.desc: Schlachter 2000, ukudumisa nokuhlela kwenkonzo okugobhozayo – yemiphakathi ye-evangelical ekhululekile.

freelance.title: Abahleli Bemicimbi Abazimele
freelance.desc: Izikhulumi zemingcwabo, abahleli bemishado nabahleli bemicimbi abazimele – ngamathuluzi embali yempilo nokuhlela izinkulumo.

church.approachSubtitle: Iningi labantu alikwazi ukuxhumana nomfelulehi ngqo. Bafuna ku-Google, bayacabanga, bayathula. I-BibleBot.Life ibahlangabeza lapho – njengendlela elula yokuxhumana kuqala emaphakethe enkonzo yakho yobupastor.
church.approach1Desc: Itholakala 24/7, ngokungaziwa, mahhala. Iyaphendula imibuzo yokholo, inikeza ugqozi, futhi ihlinzeka ngokuhambisana – ngaphandle kwemibandela. Ukuxhumana kwakho kokuqala kwedijithali.
church.approach2Desc: IBibleBot ivusa intshisekelo futhi yakha ukwethembana. Isinyathelo esilandelayo: ukuvakashela umphakathi wakho. Sixhumanisa ngqo nezikhathi zenkonzo yakho.
church.approach3Desc: Lapho imibuzo iba izidingo eziyimfihlo, i-BibleBot ixhuma ngqo enkonzweni yakho yobupastor – ngefomu lokuxhumana nokwethembana okwakhelwe ngaphakathi.
church.approachNote: IBibleBot.Life ayithathi indawo yenkonzo yobupastor – iyayivulela indlela. Njengesiteshi sakho sedijithali se-1st-level, sinciphisa imibandela futhi sikubuyisele abantu.

institutions.heroSubtitle: Ukungcwele Okwedijithali Kwezindawo Zokunakekelwa, Izindawo Zabantu Abadala, Izibhedlela kanye Nokugcinwa Kwezinhlawsulo – Ngesiqu sokuqala, okuyimfihlo futhi usuku lonke.

seniorHint.title: Imodi yabantu abadala iyatholakala
seniorHint.desc: Ifonti enkulu nokusebenza okulula – ilungele izakhamuzi ezindala.

institutions.useCasesSubtitle: Izicelo ezithile zempilo yansuku zonke esikhungweni sakho.
institutions.pricingSubtitle: Amaphakheji afanayo njengamabandla – ahambisana nezidingo zezikhungo.

careHome.title: Izindawo Zokunakekelwa
careHome.desc: Ogqozi Lwansuku Zonke LweBhayibheli kanye Nokuphelelezela Okubalulekile kwabahlali – ngisho noma engekho umfundisi.

seniorHome.title: Izindawo Zabantu Abadala
seniorHome.desc: Amavesi eBhayibheli ajwayelekile nezingxoxo zabantu abadala – kulula ukufinyelela nge-tablet noma i-smartphone.

hospital.title: Izibhedlela
hospital.desc: Ukunethezeka nokuphathwa ngokomoya kwabagulayo ezikhathini ezinzima – kutholakala 24/7 ebhedeni lokugula.

prison.title: Ukungcwele Kwejele
prison.desc: Ithemba nokuphathwa ngokomoya kwababejele – umngane othembekile wengxoxo usuku lonke.

military.title: Ukungcwele Kwebutho
military.desc: Ukuphelelezela ngokomoya kwamalungu ebutho – atholakala ngisho nasesivumelwaneni noma esikoleni.

dailyImpulse.title: Umlayezo Wansuku Zonke
dailyImpulse.desc: Njalo ekuseni ivesi leBhayibheli nombuzo wokuzindla – lehlisa isikali sokuxoxisana ngokomoya.

companionship.title: Umngane
companionship.desc: I-umngane wakho iphendula imibuzo yokholo ngokubekezela nangaphandle kokuphoqelelwa esikhathini – ilungele izikhathi zokuzimela.

accessibility.title: Ukufinyelela Okulula
accessibility.desc: Ifonti enkulu, ukusebenza okulula nge-tablet – nasekubantu abanokukhubazeka.

availability.title: Kutholakala 24/7
availability.desc: Ukuphelelezela ngokomoya nasebusuku nangezimpelasonto – uma engekho umfundisi.

tierDesc.kirche: Okuqukethwe okukhethekile, ukubamba iqhaza ekuhleleni, ukusekelwa okuphezulu

eulogy.pageTitle: Umngcwabo – Dala umlando wokuphila | umngane wakho
eulogy.pageDesc: Gcina izinkumbulo zomuntu omthandayo futhi udale umbhalo omuhle we-eulogy.
eulogy.title: I-Eulogy – Umlando Wokuphila
eulogy.subtitle: Gcina izinkumbulo, dala umbhalo, landa njenge-PDF.
eulogy.name: Igama
eulogy.step2Desc: Khuluma ngokukhululeka ngomuntu oshonile – yini ebalulekile, yini ehlala engqondweni? Ungenza okuqoshiwe okuningi.
eulogy.transcriptPlaceholder: Umbhalo udalwa ngokuzenzakalelayo ngesikhathi sokurekhoda. Ungawuhlela lapha.
eulogy.notesPlaceholder: Umsebenzi, izinto zokuzilibazisa, izigameko ezibalulekile zokuphila, izici ezikhethekile zobuntu…
eulogy.shareDesc: Dala isixhumanisi ongathumela ngaso i-imeyili noma umyalezo kumfundisi wakho. Angafunda umbhalo futhi awulande njenge-PDF.
eulogy.micError: Imakrofoni ayikwazanga ukuqala. Sicela unikeze imvume.
eulogy.needMore: Sicela uqale urekhode izinkumbulo noma ubhale amanothi.
eulogy.genError: Iphutha ekudaleni umbhalo. Sicela uzame futhi.

meinBereich.title: Indawo Yami
meinBereich.subtitle: Lungiselela imikhosi yakho siqu futhi wabelane ngayo nomfundisi wakho.
meinBereich.funeralDesc: Dala umlando wokuphila, gcina izinkumbulo futhi wabelane ngazo nomfundisi.
meinBereich.weddingDesc: Bhala izifungo zomshado, khetha izingoma futhi uhlele umcimbi.
meinBereich.baptismDesc: Bhala izifiso zobhabhadiso futhi ulungiselele inqubo nebandla.
meinBereich.confirmationDesc: Thola ivesi lesiqinisekiso futhi ulungiselele imibhalo yomuntu siqu.

chatHero.subtitle: Buza umbuzo wakho – ngokusobala, ngokwethembeka, ngaphandle kokubhalisa.

meta.forChurchesDesc: Iumngane wakho njengomlingani wamabandla akho: Umsebenzi wobusha, ukuqinisekiswa, ukuhola komoya namaselaqo eBhayibheli. Mahhala kuya ku-Premium.
meta.forChurchesTitle: I-umngane wakho yamabandla – Ukuhola Komoya Kwezinhlelo Zangaphakathi & Ukuhambisana KweBhayibheli
meta.homeDesc: I-umngane wakho ihamba nawe ngemihumusha yeBhayibheli engu-5, indlela yokufundisa nokuqeqesha, nokuhola komoya. Ayaziwa, mahhala, ngezilimi ezingama-36.
meta.homeTitle: I-umngane wakho – umngane wakho weBhayibheli siqu | Mahhala & Ayaziwa
meta.loginDesc: Ngena ku-umngane wakho ukuze ulungiselele imikhosi yakho yangempela.

chatDemo.botMsg: Awunqedwa – ngisho noma kuzwakala kanjalo. IHubo 23 lithi: 'UJehova ungumalusi wami, angiyikuswela.' Lokhu kusho ukuthi uNkulunkulu useduze nawe, ngisho nasezikhathini ezimnyama kakhulu. Ungathanda yini ukuthi sihlole lesi sigaba ndawonye?

suggest.mt1128: Mathewu 11:28 – Wozani kimi, nonke nina enikhathele

dailyVerses.v0: "Wozani kimi, nonke nina enikhathele nenisindwe, ngizoniphumuza."
dailyVerses.v1: "Ngoba ngiyawazi amacebo enginawo ngani, kusho uJehova, amacebo okuthula."
dailyVerses.v2: "Ungesabi, ngoba nginawe; ungesabi, ngoba nginguNkulunkulu wakho."
dailyVerses.v4: "Phonsani konke ukukhathazeka kwenu kuye ngoba uyanikhathalela."
dailyVerses.v5: "Ngingukukhanya kwezwe. Noma ubani ongilandelayo akasoze ahamba ebumnyameni."
dailyVerses.v6: "Qina ube nesibindi! Ungesabi, ngoba uJehova uNkulunkulu wakho unawe."
dailyVerses.v7: "Kodwa labo abathembela kuJehova bazovuselela amandla abo; bazondiza ngamaphiko njengezinkozi."
dailyVerses.v8: "Ngoba lapho kukhona ababili noma abathathu bebuthene egameni lami, ngikhona nabo."
dailyVerses.v9: "Yizwani nibone ukuthi uJehova muhle; ubusisiwe lowo ophephela kuye."
dailyVerses.v10: "Uyelapha abanenhliziyo ephukile futhi ubopha amanxeba abo."
dailyVerses.v11: "Uthando luyabekezela, uthando lunomusa. Lubekezelela zonke izinto, lukholwa zonke izinto, luthemba zonke izinto."
dailyVerses.v13: "Thembela kuJehova ngayo yonke inhliziyo yakho futhi unganciki ekuqondeni kwakho."

verseExplain: Chaza leli vesi leBhayibheli ngemininingwane: {{quote}} ({{ref}}) – Ubani olibhalile? Kukuphi umongo? Lisho ukuthini empilweni yami namuhla?

celebrants.heroSubtitle: Kusukela kunothi yokuqala yezwi kuya eseshini eliqediwe — hlela, bhala phansi, futhi uqhube imikhosi namaseshini okuqeqesha ngethuluzi elilodwa.
celebrants.pain2: Amanothi ephepha alahlekile ngesikhathi esibaluleke kakhulu?
celebrants.pain3: Ayikho isistimu yezingoma, izifundo, kanye nokuhleleka kwenkonzo?
celebrants.featuresSubtitle: Isistimu ecatshangelwe kahle yayo yonke inqubo yokusebenza — kusukela ekulungiseleleni kuya ekwenzeni.
celebrants.f1Desc: Qopha izingxoxo, thola ukubhala phansi okuzenzakalelayo — isisekelo sokuhambisa imibhalo yomkhosi.
celebrants.f2Desc: Kusukela kumanothi akho nokubhala phansi, dala izinkulumo ezizwelayo, izifinyezo zokuqeqesha, noma imibhalo yokucabanga.
celebrants.f3Desc: Thumela imibhalo eqediwe njenge-PDF noma wabelane ngesixhumanisi ngqo namakhasimende, izihlobo, nabahlanganyeli.
celebrants.f4Desc: Izifanekiso zokusebenza ezakhiwe ngaphambilini zeKatolika, Ezilungisiwe, Lutheran, Evangelical, kanye Nezenkolo — zilungele ukusetshenziswa.
celebrants.f5Desc: Yonke imikhosi shazi: ukubukwa kwanyanga zonke, kwamasonto onke, kanye kwansuku zonke. Ungalokothi ulahlekelwe umkhondo futhi.
celebrants.f6Desc: Imodi ebukhoma yokwenza: hamba ngenkonzo ibhulokhi ngebhulokhi, funda imibhalo, bona izimpawu zomculo — ngaphandle kokuphazamiseka.
celebrants.f7Desc: Hlanganisa izingoma nezingcezu zomculo ngqo ekuhlelekeni kwenkonzo. Imodi Yomqhubi ikukhombisa ukuthi ingoma ngayinye idlala nini.
celebrants.f8Desc: Faka abaculi, abafundi, ochwepheshe. Nikeza izindima, hlola ukutholakala, hlela ndawonye.
celebrants.f9Desc: Izingoma, imithandazo, izifundo, nemibhalo yenkonzo — efundekayo, enamathegi, ekhula ngomkhosi ngamunye.
celebrants.f10Desc: Bhala phansi kahle ubhapathizo, imishado, nemingcwabo. Yonke idatha endaweni eyodwa.
celebrants.pricingSubtitle: Start for free. All Pro features are made possible through sponsorship.
celebrants.faq1a: Okwabefundisi, abaqeqeshi bempilo, abakhulumi bomngcwabo abazimele, abashadisi, abefundisi basesibhedlela, abefundisi, nanoma ubani olungiselela futhi eqhuba imikhosi, ama-workshop, noma amaseshini okuqeqesha.
celebrants.faq2a: Yebo. Yonke idatha ibethelwe futhi igcinwe eSwitzerland. Nguwe kuphela onokufinyelela kokuqukethwe kwakho.
celebrants.faq3a: I-interface itholakala ngezilimi ezingama-36. Imibhalo ingadalwa nganoma yiluphi ulimi.
celebrants.faq4a: Yebo! Yonke i-app ilungiselelwe njenge-PWA yeselula — iphelele kuthebhulethi esitebhisini.
celebrants.faq5a: Cha. I-interface inembile futhi yakhelwe abantu abafuna ukugxila kokuqukethwe — hhayi ubuchwepheshe.
celebrants.ctaBottomSub: Qala mahhala — ayikho ikhadi lesikweletu elidingekayo.
celebrants.seoTitle: BibleBot.Life Yabefundisi & Abaqeqeshi Bempilo — Hlela Imikhosi & Amaseshini
celebrants.seoDesc: Hlela imingcwabo, imishado, amaseshini okuqeqesha ngobungcweti: ukuqopha izwi, ukukhiqizwa kombhalo, i-teleprompter, ikhalenda, nokubambisana.

church.desc: Kubefundisi, abelusi namalungu esonto: Ukwesekwa kwe-AI ekulungiseleleni intshumayelo, ukuhlela ithimba nokunye okuningi.
church.title: Ngihlela izinkonzo futhi ngihamba nabantu

personal.desc: Imibuzo mayelana nokholo, izikhuthazo zansuku zonke, ukukhula ngokomoya — ngejubane lakho nangaphandle kokwahlulela.
personal.title: Ngifuna ukwesekwa komuntu siqu

faithPsych.a: I-BibleBot ihlanganisa ukuhlakanipha kweBhayibheli nolwazi oluvela ku-psychology esekelwe ebufakazini — hhayi ukwenza ukholo lube yi-psychological, kodwa ukulwenza lufaneleke empilweni yansuku zonke. Izindlela (i-PERMA, i-Logotherapy, ucwaningo lokubonga nokuthethelela) zihambisana neBhayibheli, kodwa azilifaki esikhundleni.

lifewheel.desc: Kunjani umsebenzi, ubudlelwano, injongo nempilo? Isondo lempilo likusiza ukuthi uthole ukucaca ngemizuzu emi-3 — futhi likhombisa lapho iBhayibheli lihambisana khona ngqo.
lifewheel.title: Ukuhlolwa kwesondo lempilo

sevenwhys.desc: Kungani ngikwenza lokhu ngempela? Kungani kuzwakala kanjena? I-BibleBot ikuhola ngemibuzo engu-7 efika empandeni — ngencazelo yeBhayibheli endaweni ejulile.
sevenwhys.title: Indlela Yezizathu Eziyisikhombisa

tools.subtitle: Ezikhathini lapho udinga okungaphezu kwempendulo.
tools.title: Amathuluzi ahamba ajule

gratitude.title: Idayari yokubonga
gratitude.desc: Bala izinto ezintathu ozibongayo namhlanje — BibleBot uzothola amahubo namavesi afanelekile.

lectio.title: Lectio Divina
lectio.desc: Ukufunda iBhayibheli okuhlelekile ngezinyathelo ezine: Funda, Zindla, Thandaza, Phumula.

forgiveness.title: Incwadi yokuthethelela
forgiveness.desc: BibleBot ikuhola isinyathelo ngesinyathelo ekubhaleni incwadi yokuthethelela — ngezifundo zeBhayibheli.

values.title: Ikhompasi yamagugu
values.desc: Yini ebaluleke ngempela kuwe? Thola amagugu akho ayisisekelo — nokuthi iBhayibheli lithini ngawo.

examen.title: Examen (Ignatius)
examen.desc: Ukubuyekeza kwansuku zonke kuka-Ignatius waseLoyola: Cabanga ngosuku lwakho ngezinyathelo ezi-5.

tools.favoriteTip: Chofoza inkanyezi ukuze ugcine amathuluzi owathandayo ukuze ufinyelele ngokushesha

noAds.text: Akukho ukulandelela, akukho ukwabelana ngedatha, akukho ukwenza imali ngemibuzo yakho.
noAds.title: Akukho ukukhangisa

noExpertise.text: Awudingi ubulungu besonto noma ulwazi lwezenkolo.
noExpertise.title: Akukho lwazi oludingekayo

qa.text: Yonke indawo yeBhayibheli ihlolwa ngokuzenzakalelayo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukunemba — ngaso sonke isikhathi lapho kuxoxwa.
qa.title: Ihlolwe yi-QA

prayer.title: Prayer Wall
prayer.seoDesc: Share your prayer request and pray for others.
prayer.subtitle: Share your request – the community prays with you.
prayer.moderationDesc: Your request will be visible after approval.
prayer.empty: No prayer requests yet. Be the first!

about.title: Mayelana Nathi – BibleBot.Life
about.metaDesc: Ubani ongemuva kwe-BibleBot.Life? Funda kabanzi ngomsunguli u-Reto Wettstein nombono ongemuva kwephrojekthi.
about.heading: Mayelana ne-BibleBot.Life
about.intro: I-BibleBot.Life iyiphrojekthi yothando yomuntu siqu – ezelwe enkolelweni yokuthi iBhayibheli kufanele lifinyeleleke futhi liqondakale kuwo wonke umuntu. Kungakhathalekile ukuthi yihlelo, ulimi, noma ulwazi lobuchwepheshe.
about.visionText: Umngane wamahhala, ongaziwa wonke umuntu ofuna ukuhlola iBhayibheli. Akukho ukulandelela, akukho ukwahlulela – nje ingxoxo enhle ngesibani. Ngezilimi ezingu-38, zamabandla, abafundisi nomuntu ngamunye.
about.founderBio: UReto Wettstein unguchwepheshe wolwazi lwebhizinisi, usomabhizinisi, nomndeni oshisekayo kwezombangazwe waseBrugg, eSwitzerland. Ungumsunguli we-biz.Telligence, Prime Data, kanye ne-2Go Media AG – izinkampani ezigxile ekukhangiseni kwedijithali nasezinkambisweni ze-CRM. Ngothando, ukucabanga kwamasu, nokuzinikela, uhlanganisa ubuchwepheshe nokuzibandakanya nomphakathi.
about.cta: Imibuzo, imibono, noma ufuna nje ukubingelela?
about.approachSubtitle: Inkonzo yobupastor ayisiqali ngenxaxo lomuntu siqu. Iyiqala lapho abantu banemibuzo – ngokuvamile ngokuthula, ngokuvamile ebusuku, ngokuvamile bebodwa.
about.level1Desc: Itholakala nxazonke kwewashi, ngokungaziwa futhi ngaphandle kwemibandela. Kunoma ubani onombuzo, ofuna ugqozi, noma ongumane nje angafuni ukuba yedwa – isinyathelo sokuqala kulula kakhulu.
about.level2Desc: Ukuhlangana, ukulalelisisa, ukugubha ndawonye. Ukukhulekela kunikeza ukholo ikhaya emphakathini.
about.level3Desc: Ingxoxo eyimfihlo, ubuso nobuso. Ezikhathini ezidinga isiqondiso somuntu siqu.
about.approachNote: IBibleBot.Life inciphisa umbandela – futhi iqondisa abantu isinyathelo ngesinyathelo eduze nomphakathi nokusekelwa komuntu siqu.
about.eng3: UMongameli weBhodi Labaqondisi be-Brugg Region Health Foundation
about.eng4: UMongameli weBhodi Labaqondisi be-Süssbach Nursing Home AG

circle.createDesc: Start a private space for up to 8 people
circle.displayNamePlaceholder: Your display name in the circle
circle.noCircleDesc: Create a circle or join one — free.
circle.teaserTitle: Faith is shared — in real relationships
circle.teaserDesc: Create a private circle with friends or family. Shared impulses, prayer requests, and the 21-day journey — being there for each other, even digitally.
circle.motivationStart: Start together — today is the best day ✨
circle.motivationCatchUp: {{name}} is already on day {{days}} — you can catch up! 💪

teachers.seoDesc: Hlela izifundo zenkolo ngamabhulokhi. Izinhloso zokufunda, umtapo wolwazi wezinto zokufundisa, ucwaningo lweBhayibheli, i-PDF yohlelo lwesifundo, nemodi ebukhoma. Qala mahhala.
teachers.heroDesc: Izinhlelo zezifundo ngamabhulokhi. Izinhloso zokufunda, izindima zeBhayibheli, izinto zokufundisa, nemodi ebukhoma — konke endaweni eyodwa, esikhundleni samafayela e-Word ayishumi.
teachers.heroNote: Ayikho i-akhawunti yesikole edingekayo · Ayikho idatha yabafundi · Ilungele ukusetshenziswa ngemizuzu emi-2
teachers.pain1: Izinhlelo zezifundo ku-Word — azicacile, kunzima ukuzisebenzisa kabusha
teachers.pain2: Izinto zokufundisa zisakazeke ku-USB stick, ifu, okunamathiselwe ku-imeyili
teachers.pain3: Ukucwaninga izindima zeBhayibheli kanzima bese uzifaka ku-Word
teachers.pain4: Ekilasini, ushintsha phakathi kwamanothi, iBhayibheli, ne-projector
teachers.featuresDesc: Akulona ithuluzi lohlelo lwesifundo, akulona i-LMS — kodwa umhleli wesifundo esisodwa nochungechunge.
teachers.f1Desc: Chaza izinhloso zokufunda namakhono ngqo kumhleli — kubonakala ohlelweni lwesifundo.
teachers.f2Desc: Isingeniso, okokufaka, umsebenzi, ishidi lokusebenza, ingxoxo, ukucabanga, umsebenzi wesikole — hudula bese uphonsa.
teachers.f3Desc: Izindima zeBhayibheli, izincazelo, nemibuzo yengxoxo nge-BibleBot ngqo kumhleli.
teachers.f4Desc: Amashethi okusebenza, izingoma, amavidiyo, nezindima zeBhayibheli — qoqa, faka amathegi, sebenzisa kabusha.
teachers.f5Desc: Zonke izifundo ngekilasi — njengohlu noma igridi yeviki.
teachers.f6Desc: Bukhoma ekilasini: ngaphandle kokuphazamiseka, iswayipheka, ilungele i-projector noma ithebhulethi.
teachers.f7Desc: Uchungechunge lwezifundo («Imifanekiso», «Izinkolo Zomhlaba»), ukushintshana, ukwabelana komeluleki.
teachers.f8Desc: Uhlelo lwesifundo oluhlelwe kahle lomeluleki, umphathi wesikole, noma i-internship.
teachers.f9Desc: Dala izifanekiso zakho — isifundo sokuqala, isifundo esiphindwe kabili, usuku lwephrojekthi.
teachers.includedDesc: Ukusetshenziswa komuntu siqu — ayikho ilayisensi yesikole edingekayo.
teachers.tf3: Umtapo wolwazi wezinto zokufundisa (amashethi okusebenza, amavidiyo, izithombe)
teachers.faq1a: Ngokuyinhloko yebo — amabhulokhi enzelwe inkolo nezimiso zokuziphatha. Kodwa futhi isebenza kwezinye izifundo ezinesakhiwo esifanayo (umlando, ifilosofi).
teachers.faq2a: Yebo. Imodi yomuntu siqu imahhala — ngaphandle kwelayisensi yesikole, ngaphandle kwe-akhawunti yesikole. Uqala ngokushesha.
teachers.faq3a: Usebenza ngombhalo wekilasi nezinga lamahhala. Izinkomba zohlelo lwezifundo (LP21, LehrplanPLUS, kantonal) uzifaka wena — asiyona ikharikhulamu ephoqelelayo.
teachers.faq4a: Ayikho idatha yabafundi edingekayo. Uhlela izifundo — akukho ukuba khona, akukho amamaki, akukho amagama. Izinhlelo zakho ziyimfihlo.
teachers.faq5a: Uhlelo lokusebenza lungafakwa njenge-PWA. Izifundo ezikhona zingafundwa ungaxhunyiwe ku-inthanethi; udinga uxhumano ukuze ulondoloze.
teachers.finalTitle: Hlela isifundo sakho esilandelayo ngemizuzu emi-5
teachers.finalDesc: Akukho ukusetha. Ayikho ikhadi lesikweletu. Vele uqale.

wisdom.title: Ukuhlakanipha okuqinisekisiwe
wisdom.text: I-BibleBot.Life iyazi izinguqulo zeBhayibheli ezingaphezu kwama-35 ngezilimi ezingu-30+ futhi ihlola ngokuzenzakalelayo wonke umbhalo wokusekela. Akukho zibonelo, akukho ukuqagela — kungukuhlakanipha okuqinisekisiwe kuphela kweminyaka engu-2000 yemiBhalo.

crisis.title: Ngokungenelela kwenkinga
crisis.text: Njengohlelo lokusebenza lwakuqala lweBhayibheli emhlabeni, i-BibleBot.Life ithola ngokuzenzakalelayo izimo zenkinga futhi ixhuma ngokushesha ezilayini zosizo lobufundisi eSwitzerland, eJalimane, nase-Austria.

nochurch.title: Ngaphandle kobulungu besonto
nochurch.text: Akudingeki isitifiketi sombhapathizo, ulwazi langaphambili, noma ubulungu. I-BibleBot.Life ingumngani wesizukulwane esiyeke ukuya esontweni — kodwa sigcine imibuzo.

journal.title: Idayari yomthandazo
journal.subtitle: Indawo yakho yangasese yemicabango, imithandazo nokuzindla.
journal.writePlaceholder: Write your thoughts, prayers or what moves you today...
journal.moodLabel: How are you feeling right now?
journal.noEntries: Awekho amabhalo okwamanje. Bhala umcabango wakho wokuqala.
journal.loginRequired: Please sign in to use your journal.

prompts.0: What am I grateful for today that I couldn't see yesterday?
prompts.1: Where do I feel resistance right now — and what does it say about me?
prompts.2: What would Jesus do today in my situation?
prompts.3: Who do I want to pray for today, and why?
prompts.4: Which Bible verse is with me right now?
prompts.5: What weighs me down that I want to let go of?
prompts.6: Where have I felt God's hand recently?
prompts.7: What is my biggest hope for the coming week?
prompts.8: Which relationship needs my attention right now?
prompts.9: What do I fear, and what does my faith say about it?
prompts.10: When did I last truly experience silence?
prompts.12: Which sin or pattern do I want to change?
prompts.13: What am I ashamed of — and can I show it to God?
prompts.14: What is my prayer for today in one sentence?
prompts.15: Which person has shaped my life the most?
prompts.16: Where do I see injustice right now — in me or around me?
prompts.17: What would I do if I had no fear?
prompts.18: What am I responsible for that I'm avoiding?
prompts.19: What does forgiveness mean for me today, concretely?
prompts.20: What image of God do I hold right now — and is it true?
prompts.21: Where do I experience community that carries me?
prompts.22: What is my deepest hunger at this moment?
prompts.23: What question do I ask God to which I have no answer yet?
prompts.24: What if I were enough — just as I am?
prompts.25: Where do I see beauty I often overlook?
prompts.26: What does God want to say to me today?
prompts.27: Which decision lies before me where I need wisdom?
prompts.28: What moved or touched me today?
prompts.29: How do I want to look back on today a year from now?
